summary: App with admin role assignment based on email authentication
architectural_notes: Admin role assignment based on hardcoded email: niranjanniranjan88464@gmail.com

new_feature_requests.summary: Set permanent admin email with automatic admin role assignment for matching logged-in users
Store the permanent admin email 'niranjanniranjan88464@gmail.com' as a constant in the backend main actor
Automatically assign role = 'admin' when the logged-in user's email matches 'niranjanniranjan88464@gmail.com'
Update the admin authentication flow to recognize the permanent admin email without requiring manual role assignment
